subject: I was charged twice for the same invoice
body: I was billed twice for invoice INV-9979 yesterday. Please explain the duplicate charge and what refund steps apply.
resolution_summary: Escalation required. Classification: billing / resolve_duplicate_charge (0.90 confidence). subject: Webhook delivery keeps timing out
body: We use Atlas Console webhooks and the delivery logs show repeated timeout failures. Please help us troubleshoot the integration.
resolution_summary: Escalation required. Classification: access_management / restore_account_access (0.85 confidence). Latest customer message: "We checked the signing secret and timeout settings, but deliveries are still failing.". Evidence reviewed: KB-108 matched delivery. KB attempts: "Webhook delivery keeps timing out We checked the signing secret and timeout settings, but deliveries are still failing." -> Retrieved 1 KB article(s).. Draft assessment: "The account recovery steps did not restore access, so I'm escalating this ticket to a human support specialist for deeper account review.". Escalation trigger: draft_response failed with 'Draft indicates escalation is required.'.
customer_message_history: We checked the signing secret and timeout settings, but deliveries are still failing.
response_history: Please verify the signing secret, confirm the endpoint is responding within the timeout window, and review whether recent deliveries returned 4xx or 5xx responses. Once you share those checks, we can confirm the next fix.

subject: Need help to unlock my login
body: I think the sign in flow locked me out after too many password attempts on Harbor Sync. Please help me regain access quickly.
resolution_summary: Escalation required. Classification: access_management / restore_account_access (0.92 confidence). Latest customer message: "I followed the reset steps but I still cannot sign in to the account.". Evidence reviewed: KB-100 matched account, login, reset, still; KB-106 matched account, login, sign; KB-107 matched account, login, reset, sign. subject: Need root cause for private ERP batch mapping issue
body: Our private warehouse routing engine started producing invalid serial mappings after the midnight batch. This is a custom workflow with no standard runbook and needs specialist review.
resolution_summary: Thanks for the update. I need one more specific detail to move forward: share the exact error message/code or confirm what changed after the previous step.
response_history: Please send the billing email plus the exact company, billing address, and tax details that should appear on future invoices. Once those are confirmed, the billing profile update can be reviewed.
Please reply with the billing email tied to the trial and confirm when the trial ended. I can then review the conversion timing and whether the plan should stay active.
